en.title: Ausangate Circuit Trek - 4 Days
en.description: A challenging circuit around the highest peak in the Cusco region. This 4-day route covers massive glaciers, turquoise lakes, and remote Andean passes for experienced trekkers.
includes: All meals provided by trekking chef

itinerary.title: Cusco – Tinki – Upis Hot Springs
itinerary.description: Travel to Tinki and begin hiking to Upis (4400m). Camp at the foot of Ausangate and enjoy natural thermal baths.

itinerary.title: Upis – Arapa Pass – Pucacocha Lakes
itinerary.description: Cross the Arapa Pass (4850m) and descend to the stunning multi-colored Pucacocha glacial lakes.

itinerary.title: Pucacocha – Palomani Pass – Ausangate Cocha
itinerary.description: Climb to the highest point of the circuit, Palomani Pass (5200m), for unparalleled views of the mountain range. Camp at Ausangate Cocha.

itinerary.title: Ausangate Cocha – Jampa Pass – Pacchanta – Cusco
itinerary.description: A long day crossing Jampa Pass (5080m) down to the thermal springs of Pacchanta before returning to Cusco.

es.title: Circuito Ausangate - 4 Días
es.description: Un circuito desafiante alrededor del pico más alto de la región del Cusco. Esta ruta de 4 días cubre glaciares masivos, lagunas turquesas y pasos andinos remotos para senderistas experimentados.
includes: Todas las comidas preparadas por chef

itinerary.title: Cusco – Tinki – Aguas Termales Upis
itinerary.description: Viaje a Tinki y caminata inicial hasta Upis (4400m). Campamento a los pies del Ausangate con baños termales naturales.

itinerary.title: Upis – Paso Arapa – Lagunas Pucacocha
itinerary.description: Cruce del Paso Arapa (4850m) y descenso hacia las impresionantes lagunas glaciares de colores de Pucacocha.

itinerary.title: Pucacocha – Paso Palomani – Ausangate Cocha
itinerary.description: Ascenso al punto más alto del circuito, el Paso Palomani (5200m), para vistas inigualables. Campamento en Ausangate Cocha.

itinerary.title: Ausangate Cocha – Paso Jampa – Pacchanta – Cusco
itinerary.description: Día largo cruzando el Paso Jampa (5080m) hacia las aguas termales de Pacchanta antes del retorno a Cusco.
